---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that the tool doesn't support today? If this is about
applying panelcast to a new domain, describe the domain's shape (entity, event,
bounded score, observation count, chronology).

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it can be expressed through the `DatasetDescriptor`
or a new feature block rather than core model changes, note that.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about or tried.

## Additional context

Links, references, or examples that would help.
